title: Markdown frontmatter schema
description: YAML frontmatter block at the top of .md files (between --- delimiters). Defines page metadata, SEO fields, resources, and access rules.
markdownDescription: YAML frontmatter block at the top of `.md` files (between `---` delimiters).

title.description: string. Page title for HTML head and SEO.
title.markdownDescription: **`string`** Page title for HTML head and SEO.

keywords.description: string[]. Keywords for the meta keywords tag.
keywords.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Keywords for the meta keywords tag.

noIndex.description: boolean. Adds noindex/nofollow meta tag to prevent search engine indexing.
noIndex.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Adds `noindex`/`nofollow` meta tag to prevent search engine indexing.

canonical.description: string (uri). Canonical URL for the page.

alternate.description: Alternate[]. Alternate language versions of this page.
alternate.markdownDescription: **`Alternate[]`** Alternate language versions of this page.

oneOf.description: MetaItem[]. Array of custom meta tag definitions.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem[]`** Array of custom meta tag definitions.

oneOf.description: object. Key-value map of meta tag names to content values.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`object`** Key-value map of meta tag names to content values.

metadata.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem[] | object`** Custom meta tags. Array of `{name/property, content}` objects or a key-value hash.

toc.description: boolean. Show/hide the table of contents sidebar.
toc.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show/hide the table of contents sidebar.

toc-header.description: boolean. Show/hide the TOC header section.

favicon-src.description: string. Custom favicon URL for this page.
favicon-src.markdownDescription: **`string`** Custom favicon URL for this page.

interface.description: object. Per-page UI overrides (takes precedence over .yfm config).
interface.markdownDescription: **`object`** Per-page UI overrides (takes precedence over `.yfm` config).

resources.description: Resources. Per-page resources (legacy — prefer top-level script/style/csp).

script.description: string[]. Script file paths or URLs to include on this page.
script.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Script file paths or URLs to include on this page.

style.description: string[]. Stylesheet file paths or URLs to include on this page.
style.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Stylesheet file paths or URLs to include on this page.

csp.description: object[]. Content Security Policy directive overrides for this page.
csp.markdownDescription: **`object[]`** Content Security Policy directive overrides for this page.

stage.markdownDescription:
**`'new' | 'preview' | 'tech-preview' | 'skip'`** Document lifecycle stage.

- `new` — new document
- `preview` — available in preview
- `tech-preview` — available in tech preview
- `skip` — excluded from build

restricted-access.description: string[][]. Access restriction rules. Each item is an array of conditions that must all be satisfied.
restricted-access.markdownDescription: **`string[][]`** Access restriction rules. Each item is an array of conditions that must all be satisfied.

sourcePath.description: string. Source file path (usually set by the build system).
sourcePath.markdownDescription: **`string`** Source file path (usually set by the build system).

editable.description: boolean. Whether the document is editable (system-generated by doc-transform).
editable.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Whether the document is editable (system-generated by doc-transform).

theme.description: string. Path to generated theme CSS (system-generated in md2md output).
theme.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to generated theme CSS (system-generated in md2md output).

updatedAt.description: string. Last modification timestamp from VCS (system-generated).

__system.description: object. System variables from presets (only when addSystemMeta is enabled).
__system.markdownDescription: **`object`** System variables from presets (only when `addSystemMeta` is enabled).

__metadata.description: MetaItem[]. Metadata items from presets (only when addMetadataMeta is enabled).
__metadata.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem[]`** Metadata items from presets (only when `addMetadataMeta` is enabled).

iframes.description: object[]. Iframe query parameter forwarding rules.

queryParameters.description: object. Per-page query parameter forwarding rules for embedded iframes.
queryParameters.markdownDescription: **`object`** Per-page query parameter forwarding rules for embedded iframes.

noIndex.description: boolean. Disallow indexing by external search engines (viewer-level override).
noIndex.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disallow indexing by external search engines (viewer-level override).

disabled.description: boolean. Disable the bug report widget on this page.
disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the bug report widget on this page.

form.description: string. Custom bug report form ID.

yabug.description: object. Per-page bug report widget overrides.

ownerId.description: string | object. Feedback widget owner ID or per-language map.
ownerId.markdownDescription: **`string | object`** Feedback widget owner ID or per-language map.

hideHeader.description: boolean. Hide the feedback widget header.

disabled.description: boolean. Disable the feedback widget on this page.
disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the feedback widget on this page.

testIds.description: object. Test IDs for the feedback widget.
testIds.markdownDescription: **`object`** Test IDs for the feedback widget.

yafeedback.description: object. Per-page Yandex Feedback (Pythia) widget overrides.

projectId.description: object. Map of language codes to project IDs.
projectId.markdownDescription: **`object`** Map of language codes to project IDs.

hasOutsideClick.description: boolean. Close the widget when clicking outside.
hasOutsideClick.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Close the widget when clicking outside.

parentId.description: string | null. Parent element ID for widget placement.
parentId.markdownDescription: **`string | null`** Parent element ID for widget placement.

disabled.description: boolean. Disable the AI expert widget on this page.
disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the AI expert widget on this page.

customLabel.description: object. Map of language codes to custom widget header labels.
customLabel.markdownDescription: **`object`** Map of language codes to custom widget header labels. Use `default` key for fallback.

neuroExpert.description: object. Per-page AI expert widget overrides.

Alternate.description: Alternate. Alternate language version of the page.
Alternate.markdownDescription: **`Alternate`** Alternate language version of the page.

href.description: string (uri). URL of the alternate page.

hreflang.description: string. Language code of the alternate page.
hreflang.markdownDescription: **`string`** Language code of the alternate page (e.g. `en`, `ru`).

MetaItem.description: MetaItem. Custom HTML meta tag definition.

script.description: string[]. Script file paths or URLs.

style.description: string[]. Stylesheet file paths or URLs.
